question: How much more miles per gallon was my car getting a few months ago compared to now?

User intends to self‑install the Wix 51348 air filter after consulting the owner’s manual, will check the spark plugs, tire pressure, and get an overdue oil change (about 1000 mi late), questioning whether the oil change could be contributing to the recent drop in fuel efficiency
